info.description: A photo of Anna wearing or using a product. On hover, a small tag appears with the product name and links to the shop. Use sparingly — only where the product is genuinely central to the story.

image.description: Photo of Anna wearing or using the piece. Portrait or landscape both work.

product.description: Link to the product in the shop. Pick from your existing product list. Leave blank to show the photo without a shop link.

caption_prefix.description: Text shown before the product name on hover (e.g. 'Anna is wearing the Moonstone Necklace'). Override per-photo if you want — e.g. 'Anna is holding the' or 'Featured: the'.

alt_text.description: Accessibility description of the photo for screen readers. Brief — 'Anna wearing the Moonstone Necklace on the houseboat'.
